_comment: Editable rules for the WC / TDI wage-basis page. Edit values here (or via the page's Parameters panel, then commit the exported JSON) and they go live for everyone. Update the TDI cap each year from Hawaii DLIR.

tdi.note: Hawaii DLIR 2026: employee TDI is 0.50% of weekly wages up to the max weekly wage base of $1,500.21 (max deduction $7.50/wk). The cap is applied per check as cap x weeks-in-period. Update annually: https://labor.hawaii.gov/dcd/

wc.note: WC payroll basis = gross_wage minus the overtime premium (the 1/2 of time-and-a-half), minus per diem and auto allowance. No per-employee wage cap for W-2 employees.
